response.justification: The candidate lacks mandatory C++ experience on Windows and has no demonstrated background in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domains — instead, their career is centered on web, mobile, and open-source projects using TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with no evidence of SQL Server/Oracle or financial systems development.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Active open-source contributor with demonstrated technical depth
Excellent communication skills evidenced by workshops and talks
concerns: No professional C++ development on Windows platform as required
Zero experience in fixed income, capital markets, or banking domains
SQL experience is generic; no evidence of SQL Server or Oracle in financial systems
